steps.title: Substitute to eliminate the repeating expression
steps.content:
The term $(4-5x)$ appears in every term on both sides. Let $u = 4-5x$ to simplify. Substituting into the original equation:
$$2u + 7u + 9 = 8u + 6$$

steps.title: Combine and solve for u
steps.content:
Simplify the left side: $2u + 7u = 9u$, giving:
$$9u + 9 = 8u + 6$$
Subtract $8u$ from both sides:
$$u + 9 = 6$$
Therefore:
$$u = -3$$
